sections.paragraph:
Original: רעמסס רעמסס

Transliteration: ra‛mesês ra‛amsês

Phonetic: rah-mes-ace'

BDB Definition:

Raamses or Rameses = "child of the sun"
  1. a city in lower Egypt built by Hebrew slaves; probably in Goshen

Origin: of Egyptian origin

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
